title: ferray-random: only f64 output — no f32 random generation
description:
Goal: 

Acceptance criteria:
- 

NumPy's Generator.random() accepts dtype=np.float32 for f32 output. Generator.standard_normal() also supports dtype=np.float32 and even has a dedicated float32 Ziggurat implementation for speed. ferray-random hardcodes f64 everywhere — all distributions return Array<f64, Ix1>. BitGenerator has next_f32() but it's never used by any distribution. Add dtype-generic generation or at least f32 variants for the core distributions (random, normal, uniform, exponential).
